message:
feat: add db_fec module, WAL-FEC recovery tests, and query pipeline compliance

- crates/fsqlite-core/src/db_fec.rs (new): database-level FEC
  coordination module
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/lib.rs: register db_fec module
- crates/fsqlite-wal/tests/wal_fec_recovery.rs (new): integration tests
  for the WAL-FEC recovery pipeline covering damaged group
  identification, decode round-trip, and fallback behavior
- crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_202x_query_pipeline_compliance.rs
  (new): compliance test for the query execution pipeline
- Update issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
